speaker: RICHARD
text: Now, Clifford, I have singled thee alone.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Suppose this arm is for the Duke of York,

speaker: RICHARD
text: And this for Rutland, both bound to revenge,

speaker: RICHARD
text: Wert thou environed with a brazen wall.

speaker: CLIFFORD
text: Now, Richard, I am with thee here alone.

speaker: CLIFFORD
text: This is the hand that stabbed thy father York,

speaker: CLIFFORD
text: And this the hand that slew thy brother Rutland,

speaker: CLIFFORD
text: And here’s the heart that triumphs in their death

speaker: CLIFFORD
text: And cheers these hands that slew thy sire and brother

speaker: CLIFFORD
text: To execute the like upon thyself.

speaker: RICHARD
text: Nay, Warwick, single out some other chase,

speaker: RICHARD
text: For I myself will hunt this wolf to death.
